variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14508 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14508 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14508 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 16 167 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14508
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4558 Air, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14508
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4558 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
